features: 6 x Axe deodorant/body spray Africa 150 ml
description: Product description Axe Africa Men's Deodorant Body Spray 150 ml 6 x 150 ml Directions 1. Clean and dry the armpits before use. 2. Hold the bottle 15 cm away from the armpit. 3. Spray a thin, even film of deodorant under the armpits. 4. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. 5. Reapply as needed during the day or after physical exertion for continuous protection.
